npwp.description: Nomor Pokok Wajib Pajak — 16-digit tax identification number. New format post-2024 (previously 15 digits). Required for all registered sellers on ION. Validated against DJP registry.
npwp.x-ion-regulatory: PMK 136/2023 tentang Perubahan atas PMK No 112/PMK.03/2022

nib.description: Nomor Induk Berusaha — 13-digit business registration number issued by OSS (Online Single Submission). Mandatory for all ION network participant sellers.
nib.x-ion-regulatory: PP 5/2021 tentang Penyelenggaraan Perizinan Berusaha Berbasis Risiko

nikNumber.description: Nomor Induk Kependudukan — 16-digit national identity number from e-KTP. Required for individual (non-business) sellers.

pkpStatus.description: PKP = Pengusaha Kena Pajak (VAT-registered, can issue Faktur Pajak). NON_PKP = non-VAT-registered (cannot issue Faktur Pajak). PKP sellers are mandated once turnover exceeds IDR 4.8 billion/year.
pkpStatus.x-ion-regulatory: UU 8/1983 tentang Pajak Pertambahan Nilai Pasal 3A

legalEntityName.description: Registered business name as per OSS/notary deed. For PT: "PT Nama Perusahaan Tbk". For UD/CV: "UD Nama Usaha". For individual: full name as per KTP.

businessType.description: Legal entity type. PT=Limited company, CV=Commanditaire Vennootschap, UD=Usaha Dagang, PERORANGAN=Individual.

siupNumber.description: Surat Izin Usaha Perdagangan — business trade license. Legacy field, being replaced by NIB under OSS but still referenced by some regulatory frameworks.

spPIRTNumber.description: SP-P-IRT (Surat Pernyataan Pemilik) — small-scale food production license for home industries. Required for UMKM food sellers who do not have BPOM registration.
spPIRTNumber.x-ion-regulatory: PerBPOM 22/2018 tentang Pedoman Pemberian Sertifikat Produksi Pangan Industri Rumah Tangga
